verification.target_vocab_notes: 紅茶 appears in comparison structure
verification.grammar_notes: Uses は particle, より particle (comparison), が particle, adjective 好き. All N5 patterns.
verification.difficulty_notes: Comparative preference structure with より. Mid-level N5 with practical usage.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example with comparative structure

verification.target_vocab_notes: そちら appears indicating direction/location
verification.grammar_notes: Uses は particle, が particle, に particle, た form, の nominalization, か question particle, ている form (聞いていない). All N5 patterns.
verification.difficulty_notes: Complex sentence with embedded question clause, multiple particles, negative continuous form. Grammatically N5 but structurally complex.
verification.overall_notes: Upper limit of N5 complexity but all grammar is N5-level

verification.target_vocab_notes: そちら appears as topic/location
verification.grammar_notes: Uses は particle, です, か question. Basic N5 question pattern.
verification.difficulty_notes: Simple location question. Straightforward N5 structure with basic vocabulary.
verification.overall_notes: Excellent simple N5 example

verification.target_vocab_notes: そちら appears with の particle
verification.grammar_notes: Uses の particle, は particle, いかが (polite question), です. All N5 patterns.
verification.difficulty_notes: Polite question about weather. Mid-level N5 with practical conversational usage.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example with polite questioning pattern

verification.target_vocab_notes: 出かける appears in ところ construction
verification.grammar_notes: Uses は particle, ちょうど adverb, に particle, ところ construction with です. The ところ pattern for 'about to' is N5 level.
verification.difficulty_notes: Uses ところ construction (about to do). Mid-level N5 with useful temporal pattern.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example with ところ temporal pattern

verification.target_vocab_notes: 出かける appears in quoted speech
verification.grammar_notes: Uses は particle, に particle, と quotation particle, た form. All N5 patterns.
verification.difficulty_notes: Uses quotation with と言った. Mid-level N5 with reported speech pattern.
verification.overall_notes: Solid N5 example with quotation pattern

verification.target_vocab_notes: 出かける appears in dictionary form
verification.grammar_notes: Uses は particle, 時々 (sometimes), そこ, に particle, dictionary form. All N5 patterns.
verification.difficulty_notes: Simple habitual action statement. Standard N5 with frequency adverb.
verification.overall_notes: Good straightforward N5 example

verification.target_vocab_notes: でかける appears in kana form
verification.grammar_notes: Uses 時々, に particle, dictionary form. Basic N5 pattern.
verification.difficulty_notes: Simple sentence without explicit subject. Basic vocabulary and structure.
verification.overall_notes: Clean N5 example with natural subject omission

verification.target_vocab_notes: 兄 appears clearly as subject modifier
verification.grammar_notes: Uses の particle, は particle, です. Most basic N5 pattern.
verification.difficulty_notes: Simple X is Y statement about family. Basic vocabulary and straightforward structure.
verification.overall_notes: Excellent beginner N5 example

verification.target_vocab_notes: 兄 appears in お兄ちゃん (casual older brother)
verification.grammar_notes: Uses はい interjection, casual family term. Basic N5 pattern.
verification.difficulty_notes: Casual family conversation with half-sharing expression. Cultural but still accessible.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example with natural family language

verification.target_vocab_notes: 兄 appears in 兄さん (older brother)
verification.grammar_notes: Uses には particle, が particle, と particle, いる. All N5 patterns with counters.
verification.difficulty_notes: Uses counters ひとり and ふたり with family members. Mid-level N5 with multiple family terms.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example with family vocabulary and counters

verification.target_vocab_notes: Target vocabulary is 締める (shimeru - to tie) but sentence uses 閉める (shimeru - to close). These are different words with the same reading but different meanings and kanji. The target is about tying/fastening, not closing doors/windows.
verification.kana_notes: Kana reading matches the Japanese text, but wrong vocabulary word
verification.grammar_notes: Uses を particle, dictionary form, だ copula. N5 patterns.
verification.difficulty_notes: Simple time expression with action. Mid-level N5.
verification.overall_notes: Wrong vocabulary - uses 閉める (close) instead of 締める (tie/fasten). Homophone confusion.

verification.target_vocab_notes: Target vocabulary is 締める (to tie) but sentence uses 閉める (to close). Different verbs despite same pronunciation.
verification.kana_notes: Kana reading matches the Japanese text
verification.grammar_notes: Uses の particle, は particle, ておく pattern, ように. The ておく pattern is borderline but ように instruction form might be N4+.
verification.difficulty_notes: Uses ておく (do in advance) and ように instruction. Complex for N5.
verification.overall_notes: Wrong vocabulary - uses 閉める instead of 締める. Also grammar may be borderline N4+.

verification.target_vocab_notes: Target vocabulary is 締める (to tie) but sentence uses 閉めた (閉める - to close). Different verbs.
verification.kana_notes: Kana reading matches the Japanese text
verification.grammar_notes: Uses は particle, を particle, て form, た form. All N5 patterns.
verification.difficulty_notes: Simple sequential action sentence. Standard N5.
verification.overall_notes: Wrong vocabulary - uses 閉める instead of 締める

verification.target_vocab_notes: 熱い appears modifying コーヒー
verification.grammar_notes: Uses を particle, て form (入れて), あげましょう. The あげる giving pattern and ましょう suggestion are N5 level.
verification.difficulty_notes: Uses あげる benefactive pattern and ましょう suggestion. Mid-level N5 with polite offering.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example with benefactive pattern

verification.target_vocab_notes: 熱い appears in く-adverbial form (熱くて)
verification.grammar_notes: Uses potential negative form 飲めなかった (couldn't drink). Potential forms are N4+ grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Uses potential negative form and て-cause structure. Beyond N5 grammar.
verification.overall_notes: Contains N4+ potential form 飲める. Not appropriate for N5.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 熱い appears in nominalized form (熱いの)
verification.grammar_notes: Uses は particle, の nominalization, が particle, 好きだ. All N5 patterns.
verification.difficulty_notes: Preference expression with nominalized adjective. Mid-level N5 pattern.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example with nominalization and preference

verification.target_vocab_notes: Target is 細い (hosoi) but sentence has 細っこい (kosokkoi) which is a colloquial/emphatic variant. The kana shows こまっこい which doesn't match 細い reading (ほそい).
verification.kana_notes: Shows こまっこい but standard reading of 細 would be ほそ not こま. This appears to be a dialectal or colloquial form.
verification.grammar_notes: Uses の particle, question word どこ, に particle, だ copula with か. N5 patterns.
verification.difficulty_notes: Uses colloquial/dialectal form and rhetorical question. Complex for N5.
verification.overall_notes: Major kana discrepancy - 細っこい is not standard 細い. Unclear if target vocabulary truly present.

verification.target_vocab_notes: Target is 細い (hosoi - thin) but kana shows こまい not ほそい. The reading appears to be 細い (komai/hosomai) which may be variant reading.
verification.kana_notes: Shows こまい but standard reading of 細い is ほそい not こまい. Significant discrepancy.
verification.grammar_notes: Uses は particle, の particle, を particle, dictionary form. All N5 patterns.
verification.difficulty_notes: Uses 先の細い (fine-pointed) expression. Mid-level N5 with descriptive phrase.
verification.overall_notes: Major kana error - こまい vs ほそい. Target vocabulary reading incorrect.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 本棚 appears clearly in sentence
verification.grammar_notes: Uses は particle, に particle, の particle, を particle, ている form. ている is borderline but acceptable for state of placement.
verification.difficulty_notes: Uses ている and たくさんの structure. Mid-level N5 with multiple particles.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example with ている in state context

verification.target_vocab_notes: 本棚 appears as object
verification.grammar_notes: Uses は particle, に particle, を particle, て form, あげました. All N5 patterns with benefactive.
verification.difficulty_notes: Uses benefactive あげる pattern. Mid-level N5 with giving/receiving construction.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example with benefactive pattern

verification.target_vocab_notes: 本棚 appears with の particle
verification.grammar_notes: Uses の particle, は particle, 全部 (all), た form, よ particle. All N5 patterns.
verification.difficulty_notes: Simple past statement with 全部 quantifier. Mid-level N5 structure.
verification.overall_notes: Clean N5 example with quantifier usage

verification.target_vocab_notes: 結構 appears in permission expression
verification.grammar_notes: Uses て form, 結構です (it's fine/OK). N5 permission pattern.
verification.difficulty_notes: Permission expression with 結構. Mid-level N5 with practical usage.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example with permission pattern

verification.target_vocab_notes: 結構 appears in approval expression
verification.grammar_notes: Uses です, どうぞ. Basic N5 approval pattern.
verification.difficulty_notes: Simple approval/permission phrase. Practical and straightforward N5.
verification.overall_notes: Excellent simple N5 example

verification.target_vocab_notes: 結構 appears in polite refusal
verification.grammar_notes: Uses いえ (no), 結構 (no thanks), もう (already), です. All N5 patterns.
verification.difficulty_notes: Polite refusal expression. Mid-level N5 with practical conversational usage.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example with polite refusal

verification.target_vocab_notes: けっこう appears as adverb (fairly/quite)
verification.kana_notes: Shows こんにちは (konnichiwa - hello) but should be きょう (kyou - today). The kana completely misrepresents 今日.
verification.grammar_notes: Uses は particle, が particle, adjective, ね particle. N5 patterns.
verification.difficulty_notes: Weather comment with けっこう adverb. Mid-level N5.
verification.overall_notes: Major kana error - shows こんにちは instead of きょう for 今日. Needs correction despite correct grammar.

verification.target_vocab_notes: こちら appears in comparison
verification.grammar_notes: Uses といえば which is a conditional/topic-shift pattern that is typically N4+ level.
verification.difficulty_notes: Uses といえば construction which is advanced. Complex topic-shifting pattern.
verification.overall_notes: Contains N4+ grammar (といえば). Not appropriate for N5.

verification.target_vocab_notes: こちら appears indicating direction
verification.grammar_notes: Uses ほら interjection, が particle, に particle, dictionary form, よ particle. All N5 patterns.
verification.difficulty_notes: Natural exclamation with direction. Mid-level N5 with interjection.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example with natural interjection

verification.target_vocab_notes: こちら appears as location reference
verification.grammar_notes: Uses は particle, です, か question. Basic N5 pattern.
verification.difficulty_notes: Simple location question with 初めて. Straightforward N5.
verification.overall_notes: Excellent simple N5 question

verification.target_vocab_notes: 昨夜 appears as time expression, but kana shows さくや not ゆうべ
verification.kana_notes: Target vocabulary kana is ゆうべ but sentence shows さくや. Both are valid readings of 昨夜 but target specifies ゆうべ.
verification.grammar_notes: Uses は particle, た form, んです explanatory form. んです is N5 level.
verification.difficulty_notes: Uses んです explanatory pattern. Mid-level N5.
verification.overall_notes: Minor issue - uses さくや reading instead of target ゆうべ reading. Both valid but doesn't match target.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 昨夜 appears but kana shows さくや not ゆうべ
verification.kana_notes: Target vocabulary reading is ゆうべ but sentence uses さくや reading. Reading mismatch.
verification.grammar_notes: Uses は particle, に particle, た form. All N5 patterns.
verification.difficulty_notes: Simple past action statement. Mid-level N5.
verification.overall_notes: Uses さくや reading instead of target ゆうべ. Doesn't match target vocabulary reading.

verification.target_vocab_notes: ゆうべ appears in kana form
verification.kana_notes: Kana reading matches perfectly with target reading
verification.grammar_notes: Uses は particle, の particle, で particle (cause), た form. All N5 patterns.
verification.difficulty_notes: Cause-effect statement with death. Grammatically simple but somber content.
verification.overall_notes: Grammar is N5 but content involves death which may be heavy for beginners

verification.target_vocab_notes: ゆうべ appears in kana form
verification.grammar_notes: Uses は particle, の particle, で particle, た form. All N5 patterns.
verification.difficulty_notes: Identical to example_index 2. Same sentence repeated.
verification.overall_notes: Duplicate of previous example. Should be removed or replaced with different sentence.

verification.target_vocab_notes: ゆうべ appears in kana form
verification.grammar_notes: Uses たら conditional form (来ていたら - if she had come). たら is N4+ conditional grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Uses conditional たら with past tense and なあ wish particle. Beyond N5 grammar.
verification.overall_notes: Contains N4+ conditional たら form. Not appropriate for N5.

verification.target_vocab_notes: ゆうべ appears in kana form
verification.grammar_notes: Uses ので causal conjunction (疲れていたので - because I was tired). ので is N4+ grammar for complex reasons.
verification.difficulty_notes: Uses ので causal pattern and ている form. Beyond N5 grammar level.
verification.overall_notes: Contains N4+ conjunction ので. Not appropriate for N5.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 絵 appears clearly in expression
verification.grammar_notes: Uses は particle, を particle, dictionary form, が particle, ある. All N5 patterns.
verification.difficulty_notes: Uses idiomatic expression 目がある (has an eye for). Culturally complex despite N5 grammar.
verification.overall_notes: Grammar is N5 but 目がある is idiomatic and may be challenging for beginners to understand.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 絵 appears as object
verification.grammar_notes: Uses ても conditional form (忙しくても - even if busy). ても is N4+ conditional grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Uses conditional ても and どんなに construction. Beyond N5 grammar.
verification.overall_notes: Contains N4+ conditional ても form. Not appropriate for N5.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 絵 appears with の particle
verification.grammar_notes: Uses は particle, の particle, を particle, た form. All N5 patterns.
verification.difficulty_notes: Simple past action statement. Straightforward N5 structure.
verification.overall_notes: Good clean N5 example

verification.target_vocab_notes: Target is 絵 (e - picture) but sentence contains せざるをえなかった where え is part of the grammar pattern せざるをえない (cannot help but). This is not the target vocabulary.
verification.kana_notes: Kana matches Japanese but target vocabulary not present
verification.grammar_notes: Uses passive られた form and complex grammar pattern せざるをえない (cannot help but). This is N4+ grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Extremely complex with passive and advanced necessity pattern. Far beyond N5.
verification.overall_notes: Target vocabulary not present - false match on え sound. Contains N4+ passive and complex grammar.

verification.target_vocab_notes: Target is 絵 (e - picture) but sentence contains まえもって (in advance) where え is part of 前. This is not the target vocabulary.
verification.kana_notes: Kana matches but target vocabulary not present
verification.grammar_notes: Uses は particle, に particle, dictionary form, だろう presumption. だろう is N5 level.
verification.difficulty_notes: Uses だろう presumptive and expression まえもって. Mid-level N5.
verification.overall_notes: Target vocabulary not present - false match on え sound in 前もって

verification.target_vocab_notes: Target is 絵 (e - picture) but sentence contains いえ (no) which is not the target vocabulary. False match on え sound.
verification.kana_notes: Kana matches but target vocabulary not present
verification.grammar_notes: Uses いえ (no), 結構, もう, です. All N5 patterns.
verification.difficulty_notes: Polite refusal expression. Mid-level N5.
verification.overall_notes: Target vocabulary not present - false match on いえ (no) not 絵 (picture)

verification.target_vocab_notes: 使う appears in negative command
verification.grammar_notes: Uses の particles, は particle, dictionary form with な prohibition. な prohibition is N5 level (casual negative command).
verification.difficulty_notes: Uses な prohibition form. Mid-level N5 with command structure.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example with prohibition pattern

verification.target_vocab_notes: 使われています appears as passive continuous form
verification.grammar_notes: Uses passive form 使われています (is being used). Passive forms (れる/られる) are N4+ grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Uses passive voice with ている. Beyond N5 level.
verification.overall_notes: Contains N4+ passive grammar. Not appropriate for N5.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 使われている appears as passive continuous form
verification.grammar_notes: Uses passive form 使われている (is being used). Passive forms are N4+ grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Uses passive voice. Beyond N5 grammar level.
verification.overall_notes: Contains N4+ passive grammar. Not appropriate for N5.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 休もう appears as volitional form
verification.grammar_notes: Uses の particle, で particle, ちょっと, volitional よう form, よ particle. Basic volitional suggestion is N5 level.
verification.difficulty_notes: Uses volitional form for suggestion. Mid-level N5 with casual suggestion.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example with volitional suggestion

verification.target_vocab_notes: 休みます appears in polite form
verification.grammar_notes: Uses は particle, ます form. Most basic N5 pattern.
verification.difficulty_notes: Very simple future statement. Basic N5 structure.
verification.overall_notes: Excellent simple N5 example

verification.target_vocab_notes: 休ませて appears as causative form
verification.kana_notes: Shows きゅうませて but should be やすませて for 休ませて. Wrong reading provided.
verification.grammar_notes: Uses causative form 休ませて (let me rest). Causative forms (させる/せる) are N4+ grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Uses causative form for permission. Beyond N5 level.
verification.overall_notes: Contains N4+ causative form and has kana error. Not appropriate for N5.

verification.target_vocab_notes: テスト appears clearly in sentence
verification.grammar_notes: Uses potential negative form 答えられなかった (couldn't answer). Potential forms are N4+ grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Uses potential negative form and も particle. Beyond N5 grammar.
verification.overall_notes: Contains N4+ potential form. Not appropriate for N5.

verification.target_vocab_notes: テスト appears as subject
verification.grammar_notes: Uses から particle, が particle, dictionary form 始まる. All N5 patterns.
verification.difficulty_notes: Simple future statement with time expression. Mid-level N5.
verification.overall_notes: Good straightforward N5 example

verification.target_vocab_notes: テスト appears in main clause
verification.grammar_notes: Uses の particle, は particle, の particle, と particle (comparison), た form, と quotation, が particle, た form. All N5 patterns.
verification.difficulty_notes: Complex sentence with comparison, quotation, and multiple clauses. Grammatically N5 but structurally complex.
verification.overall_notes: Upper limit of N5 complexity with comparison and reported speech
